svg.title: eID LoA3 Authentication + remote identity proofing in IT-Wallet PID Issuance Flow + security controls

g.text: eID LoA3 Authentication + remote identity proofing in IT-Wallet PID Issuance Flow + security controls
using eID Substantial Authentication with MRTD Verification
with OAuth-Client-Attestation and OAuth-Client-Attestation-PoP in the Header and
Phase 2: Primary Authentication - eID User Authentication with LoA Substantial
with OAuth-Client-Attestation and OAuth-Client-Attestation-PoP in the Header
with mrtd_pop_nonce, challenge and (optionally) MRZ data
[If MRZ is not available to the Wallet Instance]
NFC Interaction with the User for Document Proof of Possession Protocol Flow
with OAuth-Client-Attestation and OAuth-Client-Attestation-PoP in the Header
HTTP Request for validity status of the
PID Authorization Response with Auth Code
The flow continues according to PID Issuance flow as defined in the IT-Wallet specification
